task: graph classification and node classification (downstream tasks)
input: graph-structured data (e.g., citation networks, social networks)
output: predicted labels for graphs or nodes
backbone: GNN encoder (e.g., GCN, GIN) with readout layer
loss: link prediction loss (pre-training) + task-specific loss (prompt tuning)
key_idea: unify pre-training and downstream tasks via a common task template and learnable prompt vectors to bridge the gap
datasets: five public datasets (not specified in abstract)
